title: PlantAssociation
description: Association between a power plant supplemental attribute and a generating unit, identifying the group the unit belongs to within the plant. Covers 1-to-n cases: ThermalPowerPlant shafts, HydroPowerPlant penstocks, RenewablePowerPlant PCCs, and CombinedCycleFractional exclusion groups. The semantics of group_index are determined by the parent plant's type.

plant_id.description: ID of the parent plant supplemental attribute

entity_id.description: ID of the generating unit (entity) participating in the plant

group_index.description: Group number within the plant (shaft, penstock, PCC, or exclusion group, depending on the parent plant's type)
